design_philosophy: A Bloomberg Terminal meets modern SaaS. Data density, stark contrast, and modular panels. Zero decorative elements. Form follows function. Asymmetry and high-density technical grids are prioritized.

layout_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - High density, strict borders, 1px lines dividing content. Map-centric focus taking up 60%+ of the viewport.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-neutral-800 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-xs transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border border-black hover:bg-neutral-100 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-xs transition-colors
buttons.action: bg-[#002fa7] text-white hover:bg-blue-900 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-xs

cards.property: border border-neutral-300 bg-white hover:border-black transition-colors duration-200 p-0 rounded-none shadow-none cursor-pointer
cards.metric: p-3 border-r border-b border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-50 flex flex-col gap-1

inputs.style: border-b border-black rounded-none bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#002fa7] text-sm transition-colors

skip_trace_panel.style: A dark 'intelligence dossier' panel. Background #0a0a0a, with neon green (#39ff14) monospace text for phone numbers and emails to create a stark contrast against the rest of the light UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a pure React (Vite) app with Tailwind CSS using .js/.jsx files.
Install 'react-leaflet' and 'leaflet' for the map view. Ensure map container takes up full remaining height. Use a light or monochrome carto basemap.
Do NOT use soft shadows or rounded corners (`rounded-none` everywhere). Rely on pure 1px solid borders (`border-neutral-300` or `border-black`) for element separation.

Layout Strategy: Create a 3-pane layout. Left pane (w-64) for filter pillars (accordions). Center pane for the Map. Right pane (w-96) for the Property Feed list. Ensure panes have a 1px border separating them.
Property Detail View: Should slide out or replace the Right pane. Must include an action menu with 'Add to Spreadsheet' and 'Run Skip Trace'.

Skip Trace Panel: When activated, this section should invert the theme. Use black background (`bg-[#0a0a0a]`) and terminal green text (`text-[#39ff14]`) for phone numbers to feel like an intelligence lookup.
Underwriting Math Engine: Use `IBM Plex Mono` for all calculator numbers (Repair, ARV, GRM, Cap Rate). Group them in a tight 2x2 grid.
Lists/Spreadsheet Manager: Build a dense HTML table (`<table className="w-full text-sm">`) with sticky headers and zero padding between cells, only borders.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements as per CRITICAL_RULES (e.g., `data-testid="filter-vacant-toggle"`, `data-testid="run-skip-trace-btn"`).
Customize Shadcn UI (if used) to strip away all border-radii and default shadows.
